name: nova-orbit
description: AI Team Orchestration + Quality Gate for Solo Founders

scripts.dev:dashboard: wait-on http://127.0.0.1:7200/api/health && cd dashboard && VITE_WS_URL=ws://127.0.0.1:7200 npx vite --port 5173
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:dashboard
scripts.build:dashboard: cd dashboard && npm run build && mkdir -p ../dist/dashboard && cp -r dist/* ../dist/dashboard/
scripts.postbuild: mkdir -p dist/server/core/nova-rules && cp -r server/core/nova-rules/*.md server/core/nova-rules/*.json dist/server/core/nova-rules/ 2>/dev/null; chmod +x dist/bin/nova-orbit.js
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run sync:nova && npm run build && npm test

author: TeamSPWK
